! Blacklist - blocked domains
! Format: mixed AdGuard, EasyList, and hosts-style entries

! AdGuard-style domain filters
||ads.example.com^
||tracker.example.com^
||malware.example.org^
||*.ad.doubleclick.net^
||ads*.google-analytics.com^

! Exception rule (should be treated as allow)
@@||safe.example.com^

! Hosts-style entries
0.0.0.0 adserver.example.com
127.0.0.1 tracking.example.net
0.0.0.0 spyware.example.org

! Wildcards
||*.tracking.example.com^

! Lines that should be skipped/warned
example.com##.ad-banner
||example.com/path/to/ad^
